fields.description: The base image to ship. Its rootfs is the read-only atlas-image-<name> LV on the source server.
fields.label: Image
Status
fields.options:
Pending
Exporting
Hydrating
Finalizing
Registering
Cleanup
Done
Failed

fields.description: Live, always-current line describing exactly what the export is doing right now (which host, which step). Stamped by advance_export BEFORE each phase runs, and refined by the long copy as it progresses.
fields.label: Progress

fields.description: Percent complete of the base-image copy; -1 when the current phase is not a measurable copy.
fields.label: Progress %

fields.description: The server the image is copied FROM. Denormalized at insert from where the image's base LV lives; a local image lives on exactly one server. Immutable.
fields.label: Source Server

fields.description: The server the image is copied TO. Operator-chosen. After a Done export the target gains an identical local base image row it can provision from.
fields.label: Target Server

fields.description: TCP port the source NBD server binds for the base LV; the image-directory tar rides on nbd_port + 1. Derived from the image name so concurrent exports of different images never collide.
fields.label: NBD Port

fields.description: The source base LV's actual byte size, recorded at export. The target LV is created at least this large. Long Int — a disk byte count overflows a 32-bit Int.
fields.label: Base Size Bytes

fields.description: Consecutive no-progress hydration polls; the phase fails past a threshold.
fields.label: Hydration Stall Ticks

fields.description: The phase the export was in when it failed; retry() resumes here.
fields.label: Error At Status
